headline: 2 Healthcare Stocks to Buy for Their Dividends—and Why Pfizer Isn’t One of Them
summary: Finding stocks with generous dividends isn’t easy these days, and with packaged food giant Conagra recently getting demoted from the S&P 500, Pfizer is now the highest yielding stock in the benchmark index.  The drug company, which has made quarterly payouts more than 80 straight years, is certain to get a lot of attention from dividend hunters.  Pfizer’s high yield reflects investors’ trepidation over the stock.
